title: Observable — How Magnetic Fields Reach Across Space

warnings: [SCIENCE] illustrative-not-simulation disclosure required — state visuals are educational illustration, not simulation output
notes: Row 6: AI-disclosure obligation planned — verify presence at Pre-Publish.
Social = mass dissemination. Platform AI-label + community guidelines apply.
Revise and re-submit to Legal Gate (Gate 0).

science_subject.key_measurement: Earth's surface field ~25–65 μT; MMS mission maps magnetopause reconnection at sub-electron scales
science_subject.visualization_prompt: Scientific physics visualization, magnetic field lines around a bar magnet and Earth's magnetosphere cross-section, closed loops from north to south, NASA MMS-inspired magnetopause context, iron filing pattern logic without false single-pole lines, neutral dark background, field line density shows strength, NOT TO SCALE, 16:9 documentary fidelity

sources.citation: NASA — Magnetospheric Multiscale (MMS) mission imagery, magnetic reconnection in Earth's magnetosphere (2014)
Maxwell, J. C. A Dynamical Theory of the Electromagnetic Field (1865) — unified electric and magnetic phenomena
sources.notes: Foundational theory for fields propagating through space

sources.citation: NASA Space Place — Earth's magnetosphere protects from solar wind
sources.notes: Public-facing synthesis of geomagnetic field observations

config.voice_suffix: clear enthusiastic science communicator voice, precise but accessible diction, synthetic presenter only

shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @Julian-001: identical presenter face, smart-casual wardrobe, seamless neutral set, same eye-line to camera — seamless continuation of prior take, zero jump cut. CONTINUITY LOCK @Set-Seamless-Neutral-001: identical neutral grey seamless — same backdrop tone mid-grey #9A9A98, same floor sweep, same subject-to-backdrop distance, same falloff — seamless continuation, zero jump cut. STYLE LOCK @Style-Cool-Clinical-001: cool-clinical grade — neutral white balance, low saturation, accurate color reproduction, minimal stylistic grading, science and product trust, no warm cozy cast, no film grain. Presenter addresses camera on seamless neutral, crisp science hook. Camera: locked medium, direct address. Neutral seamless 5500K bilateral soft key locked — symmetrical wrap, subtle nose shadow only, zero hue drift, no magenta vignette, no warm/cool lateral split. Neutral 5600–6500K even field — shadow definition for shape only, no gel, no warm practicals in frame. COLOR LOCK Seamless-Neutral: backdrop #9A9A98±2%, skin true-to-life, wardrobe colors accurate, no gel spill — no magenta edge gradient, no orange spotlight cone. GRADE LOCK Cool-Clinical: grey axis neutral, skin neither pink nor yellow pushed, saturation -15% global — forbid magenta tint, forbid orange warmth, forbid teal skin on shadows, forbid vintage fade. Locked-off or slow linear track; no handheld. Lip-synced, delivers: "A magnet can pull a paperclip from a centimeter away — with nothing but air between them. How does influence cross empty space?" clear enthusiastic science communicator voice, precise but accessible diction, synthetic presenter only. Finish on presentational gesture peak, never hold dead stillness or dead frame.
shots.speech_text: A magnet can pull a paperclip from a centimeter away — with nothing but air between them. How does influence cross empty space?
shots.on_screen: Observable · How Magnetic Fields Reach Across Space

shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @Julian-001: identical presenter face, smart-casual wardrobe, seamless neutral set, same eye-line to camera — seamless continuation of prior take, zero jump cut. CONTINUITY LOCK @Set-Seamless-Neutral-001: identical neutral grey seamless — same backdrop tone mid-grey #9A9A98, same floor sweep, same subject-to-backdrop distance, same falloff — seamless continuation, zero jump cut. STYLE LOCK @Style-Cool-Clinical-001: cool-clinical grade — neutral white balance, low saturation, accurate color reproduction, minimal stylistic grading, science and product trust, no warm cozy cast, no film grain. Presenter explains the phenomenon plainly, motivated gesture, clinical lighting. Camera: slow push-in medium. Neutral seamless 5500K bilateral soft key locked — symmetrical wrap, subtle nose shadow only, zero hue drift, no magenta vignette, no warm/cool lateral split. Neutral 5600–6500K even field — shadow definition for shape only, no gel, no warm practicals in frame. COLOR LOCK Seamless-Neutral: backdrop #9A9A98±2%, skin true-to-life, wardrobe colors accurate, no gel spill — no magenta edge gradient, no orange spotlight cone. GRADE LOCK Cool-Clinical: grey axis neutral, skin neither pink nor yellow pushed, saturation -15% global — forbid magenta tint, forbid orange warmth, forbid teal skin on shadows, forbid vintage fade. Locked-off or slow linear track; no handheld. Lip-synced, delivers: "Magnetism comes from moving electric charge and from electron spin alignment inside materials. Together they create a magnetic field — a pattern in space that exerts force on other moving charges. Field lines trace that pattern: they emerge from north, curve through space, and return to south." clear enthusiastic science communicator voice, precise but accessible diction, synthetic presenter only. Finish on presentational gesture peak, never hold dead stillness or dead frame.
shots.speech_text: Magnetism comes from moving electric charge and from electron spin alignment inside materials. Together they create a magnetic field — a pattern in space that exerts force on other moving charges. Field lines trace that pattern: they emerge from north, curve through space, and return to south.

shots.speech_text: Compasses have tracked Earth's field for centuries. Satellites like NASA's Magnetospheric Multiscale mission now fly through the boundary where solar wind meets our magnetosphere — measuring reconnection events that Maxwell's equations predicted more than a hundred fifty years ago.

shots.speech_text: Magnetic fields steer auroras, protect life from solar radiation, and let motors spin inside your phone. Electromagnetism is one of the four fundamental forces — and it works by reshaping space around every current and every spinning electron.
